## WikilinksOptions.htmlAttributes property

Static attributes added to every anchor; unsafe names and `href` are ignored.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly htmlAttributes?: Readonly<Record<string, WikilinkHtmlAttributeValue>>;
```
